calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: sravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for the plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Hoddy Potter, Esq., representing the defendant Yulisha Lester through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled, Trial Date vacated.
Stipulation for entry of judgment or dismissal, filed in court.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN Clerk: Jacque Willis-McGhee Reporter: K. Held, #2857

C/C FOR MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMT; PLTF PRESENT THRU COUNSEL PAUL ARSHAWSKY, DEFT PRESENT; DEFT SWORN; COURT GRANTS DEFT MOT TO SET ASIDE THE JUDGMT DEFAULT & SIGNS ORDER THAT DEFT REIMBURSE PLTF IT COSTS & LEGAL FEES IN THE AMT OF $661.50; COUNSEL TO SEND MEMO TO SET TO UD CLERK; COURT SIGNS ORDER PREPARED BY MR. ARSHAWSKY; MATTER CONT TO 2/16/11 1:30PM #514 FOR UD SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE & 2/22/11 9AM #206 FOR UD JURY TRIAL.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: B. Fields, CSR #7235.

Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Brenda Hutcherson was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Yulisha Lester aka Yulishea Lester.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 5 Cashmere St., San Francisco, CA 94124.
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover Damages - $469.98
Costs - $295.00
Total - $764.98
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by DEFT.
The trial date of JAN-24-2010 remains on calendar.
